user_goal: B027 Real Data Snapshot Foundation — 为 Stream 1 Real Data 接入打地基。把 Tiingo Starter $10/月 数据源接入 backend Repository 抽象层 + 加 cost guard ($10 USD/月 cap + 80% threshold alert + BudgetExceeded raise) + log + GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY 注入 .env.production。不做 backfill / 不切 sleeve / 不动 strategy 代码（B028+ 责任）。Stream 1.A / Phase 1 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第二个 batch，Phase 1 起点)。本批次 3 features：(F001) Tiingo adapter + SnapshotLoader Repository 抽象 + PriceBar dataclass + httpx + 5xx/rate limit 重试 + health_check + pytest ≥10；(F002) MonthlyBudgetGuard + BudgetExceeded + tiingo_budget_log SQLite 表 + alembic migration + cost_guard 集成 TiingoSnapshotLoader + pytest ≥10；(F003) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY 注入验证 + smoke API test + signoff。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.28：** AI 5 子条 + 系统层 + UI 层 + 数据 CI 层 + 产品边界。新增产品边界 (f) Tiingo API key 仅 backend 用永不入前端/build/log + (g) 月预算 cap $10 USD enforced。决策矩阵（2026-05-26 含 vendor reselect 用户已批）：轻批次范围 (Tiingo adapter + Repository + cost guard，不含 backfill) / API key 方案 A (.env.production + GitHub Secrets，与 B021 OAuth/DB 同机制) / 不在本批次做 cross-check fallback (B028 时接 yfinance) / 数据源原 Polygon.io rebrand 为 Massive.com 引发 vendor 稳定性疑虑后改 Tiingo (独立 fintech 老牌 vendor 2014 起未 rebrand)。B026 banner 仍 enable 显示 不破。F001+F002 generator，F003 codex。预估 1-2 个轻量批次。
generator_handoff: B027 F001 done at 11206ac, F002 done at 3d14413. Both generator features green; Codex F003 takes over for L1 CI + L2 real-VM verification + signoff. Backend baseline 243+2 grew to 273+2 (+32 new B027 specs total: F001 17 + F002 15). Backend ruff + mypy clean on 131 source files; trade pytest 727 + frontend vitest 166 untouched. F001 (11206ac): workbench_api/data/ new module (snapshot_loader.py SnapshotLoader ABC + frozen/slots PriceBar with PIT docstring; tiingo_loader.py TiingoSnapshotLoader httpx + Token auth + 5xx/429/network retry+exp backoff cap=8s + PIT to_date clamp + adjClose→adj_close map + _HttpClient + _Guard Protocols for test injection); settings.py + safety allowlist add TIINGO_API_KEY (typed str | None); workbench/backend/.env.example new template documents full env surface incl TIINGO_API_KEY block; workbench/deploy/scripts/deploy.sh post-env-load TIINGO_API_KEY check exit 66 with remediation message, skipped during dev rehearsal. F002 (3d14413): workbench_api/data/cost_guard.py MonthlyBudgetGuard frozen/slots dataclass (cap=$10 / threshold=80% / est_cost=$5e-5) + check_and_increment public entry (default_log_session sessionmaker context manager + BudgetLogRepository) + _record(log, today=...) pure-data path + BudgetExceeded with Tiingo dashboard URL + cap-bump + tier-upgrade remediation; workbench_api/db/models/tiingo_budget_log.py SQLAlchemy 2.x ORM (log_date PK + month_year + call_count + total_cost_usd_est) + __init__ re-export; workbench_api/db/repositories/budget_log.py BudgetLogRepository extends Repository base with get_month_total_calls (SUM by month_year index) + increment upsert; alembic migration 0003_b027_tiingo_budget_log.py CREATE TABLE + ix_tiingo_budget_log_month_year + downgrade reverse (revision 0002→0003); workbench/deploy/scripts/deploy.sh schema-assert required tables set extended with tiingo_budget_log; workbench_api/db/migrations/env.py fileConfig(disable_existing_loggers=False) to stop alembic in-process upgrade from killing caplog'd service loggers (root-caused via budget_log alembic test → downstream db_degrade caplog failure); TiingoSnapshotLoader.__init__ extended with guard: _Guard | None default MonthlyBudgetGuard.default(); fetch_daily_bars calls guard.check_and_increment() BEFORE HTTP so tripped cap halts pre-network. Codex F003 checklist: (1) L1 CI run all 273 backend pytest + ruff + mypy + alembic up/down + frontend 166 vitest + 33 Playwright; (2) grep .next/static + backend release tarball + systemd journal for TIINGO_API_KEY literal value = 0 hits; (3) L2 real VM: Workbench Deploy after Frontend CI + Backend CI on this push; /api/health.version == main HEAD; cat /etc/workbench/workbench.env contains TIINGO_API_KEY (redacted); SSH sqlite3 'SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=table AND name=tiingo_budget_log' returns 1 row; production backend log shows alembic 0003_b027_tiingo_budget_log success; smoke API one TiingoSnapshotLoader.health_check() → 200 + budget_log +1 row; /api/debug/recent-errors count=0 after L2 flow; B026 banner still visible; (4) signoff docs/test-reports/B027-real-data-snapshot-foundation-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md + docs/screenshots/B027-snapshot-foundation/ ≥2 PNG. GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY already configured by user per project-status.md, BUT the env file on the VM (/etc/workbench/workbench.env) still needs to be rewritten with the new TIINGO_API_KEY line — bootstrap-env.yml was missing the secret until fix at dcf1463. Operator action required before next deploy can succeed: (a) dispatch .github/workflows/bootstrap-env.yml with confirm=bootstrap-env; (b) on the VM as a full-sudo admin, run `sudo install -m 640 -o root -g deploy /home/deploy/.bootstrap/workbench.env /etc/workbench/workbench.env && sudo rm /home/deploy/.bootstrap/workbench.env`; (c) re-trigger Workbench Deploy (workflow_dispatch ref=main). After step (c) succeeds, /api/health.version moves to dcf1463 (or later main HEAD) and Codex F003 L2 can verify cat /etc/workbench/workbench.env | grep TIINGO_API_KEY + sqlite3 tiingo_budget_log probe + health_check smoke. Two prior Workbench Deploy runs (for 11206ac and 4f8e81d) failed at deploy.sh pre-flight exit 66 surfacing this gap — that is the intended behaviour from the deploy.sh check, not a regression.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-26 B026 done 收尾 + B027 启动 + vendor reselect 修订一并完成。(1) B026 由 Codex 在 2026-05-26 完成 final signoff (a2e62a4)，2 fix-rounds production-only React event edge 解决（vanilla DOM fallback 双路径）。Codex L2 在 c4221d0 上确认 production HEAD == main HEAD == c4221d0，focused L2 dismiss flow 6/6 PASS。(2) v0.9.29 评估：用户决定『暂不沉淀，等二例再记账』；Planner 在 framework/proposed-learnings.md 加 v0.9.20 BL-060 模式历史注释。未来 Phase 3 Home/Reports 改造再撞同类 local-pass-prod-fail UI 互动问题时由当时 Planner 合并沉淀为 v0.9.29。(3) B027 启动初版选 Polygon.io Starter $30/月 (commit 88ccf89)。(4) **Vendor reselect (2026-05-26)**：用户访问 polygon.io 时发现 301 永久 redirect 到 massive.com (2026 Q1 rebrand)；APIs 继续兼容但 vendor 稳定性疑虑。Planner 重新评估 7 候选 vendor 后用户选定方案 B：**Tiingo Starter $10/月 (独立 fintech 老牌 2014 起未 rebrand) + yfinance 免费 cross-check (留 B028 接入)**。Massive 保留为备选。月预算节省 $19 (¥130/月)。(5) 修订内容：data-source-evaluation §3.2 / §6.1 / §6.2 / §8 主选改 Tiingo + 加 2026-05-26 reselect 历史注释；B027 spec 全文 Polygon → Tiingo (BASE_URL https://api.tiingo.com/tiingo + Authorization 'Token {key}' + endpoint /tiingo/daily/{ticker}/prices)；类名 PolygonSnapshotLoader → TiingoSnapshotLoader；文件 polygon_loader.py → tiingo_loader.py；env var POLYGON_API_KEY → TIINGO_API_KEY；表名 polygon_budget_log → tiingo_budget_log；cap $30 → $10 USD；alembic migration add_tiingo_budget_log_table；Tiingo JSON schema adjClose 字段适配；增 §12 Vendor 备选记录列出决策痕迹。(6) features.json + progress.json + project-status.md 同步更新；backlog.json 不动；framework/proposed-learnings.md 注释已加（commit 88ccf89 时）。(7) status 仍 building (混合批次：F001+F002 generator + F003 codex)。(8) 下一会话 Generator 起 F001：SnapshotLoader 抽象 (vendor-agnostic) + TiingoSnapshotLoader 实现 + httpx + 5xx/rate limit 重试 + pytest ≥10。关键注意点：① 不引入 Tiingo Python SDK (避 vendor lock-in，httpx 直接 REST，rebrand-proof)；② TIINGO_API_KEY 走 os.environ 缺时 raise RuntimeError 含修复指引；③ Authorization header 'Token {api_key}' (Tiingo 鉴权)；④ Tiingo JSON 响应 schema: date/open/high/low/close/adjClose/volume；⑤ rate limit 60 req/hour (比 Polygon 5/min 宽松)；⑥ deploy.sh pre-flight check 不阻塞 B021-B026 部署仅 B027 deploy 时验；⑦ F002 时加 tiingo_budget_log + alembic + cost_guard 集成；⑧ GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY **已预配置完成**（2026-05-26 用户主动告知）；Generator F001/F002 实施无需中断等待 user 协助；F002 alembic migration 可直接走完整流程；F003 L2 可直接验证 .env.production 含 TIINGO_API_KEY；⑨ B026 banner 仍 enable 不破。(9) 后续路径按 implementation-path §4 顺序：B028 (Stream 1.B 历史价格 backfill + 新增 yfinance_loader.py cross-check) → B029 (Stream 1.C 财务 SEC EDGAR；Tiingo 不含 fundamentals 所以 SEC EDGAR 是原计划) → B030 (Stream 1.D 全 sleeve 切真 + reports/ fixture vs real 对比) → 里程碑 A Layer 0→1 → B030 done by acceptance 修改 .env.production NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false 让 B026 banner 自然下线。
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-26 同一会话内连做 B027 F001 + F002。F001 (commit 11206ac, 9 files +767): 新模块 workbench_api/data/ 含 SnapshotLoader ABC + 'frozen/slots PriceBar' 含 PIT 语义文档 + TiingoSnapshotLoader (httpx + 'Token {key}' Authorization + 5xx/429/network 错的 3 次指数 backoff cap=8s + 401/403 私有 _AuthFailure 由 health_check 转 False 而 fetch_daily_bars 透传 + PIT to_date 钳到 today + adjClose→adj_close 映射 + 缺字段 ValueError 含 ticker + 实际 keys); settings.py + safety EXPECTED_ALLOWLIST 加 TIINGO_API_KEY (str | None default None，process boot vendor-free); workbench/backend/.env.example 新模板 9 env vars 含 TIINGO_API_KEY 节注明 GitHub Secret 注入 systemd EnvironmentFile + Tiingo dashboard 链接 + backend-only 边界提醒; workbench/deploy/scripts/deploy.sh 加 post-env-load TIINGO_API_KEY 缺失 check (exit 66 + stderr 修复指引；EnvironmentFile 不可读时 skip 不阻塞 dev rehearsal); tests +17 (test_snapshot_loader.py 4 ABC TypeError + PriceBar frozen + slots + 8 字段 shape + test_tiingo_loader.py 13 missing-key raise + env-var resolve + 200 parse + 5xx [0.5,1.0] backoff + 429 retry + 3 次耗尽 raise httpx.HTTPStatusError + 未来 to_date clamp + missing adjClose ValueError + non-list ValueError + ConnectError retry + health_check 200→True + 401→False + 多 ticker 1:1 URL); 用 _HttpClient Protocol 解决 _StubClient mypy 类型. F002 (commit 3d14413, 11 files +710): workbench_api/data/cost_guard.py MonthlyBudgetGuard frozen/slots (cap=10.0 / threshold=0.80 / est=5e-5) + check_and_increment public entry (用 default_log_session 开 sessionmaker + BudgetLogRepository CM) + _record(log, today=...) 纯数据路径 (cap → BudgetExceeded raise 在 increment 前 / >=80% → tiingo_budget_near_cap warning / 否则 increment +1) + BudgetExceeded 异常含 Tiingo dashboard URL + cap-bump 修复指引 + tier-upgrade + _BudgetLog Protocol; workbench_api/db/models/tiingo_budget_log.py TiingoBudgetLog SQLAlchemy 2.x typed (log_date PK 映射 'date' 列 + month_year YYYY-MM + call_count + total_cost_usd_est) + __init__.py 加 import + __all__ 加 TiingoBudgetLog; workbench_api/db/repositories/budget_log.py BudgetLogRepository extends Repository base + get_month_total_calls SUM(call_count) WHERE month_year=YYYY-MM (单 month_year 索引扫) + increment upsert (新 row insert call_count=1 / existing +1 total_cost_usd_est += cost) + flush; alembic migration 0003_b027_tiingo_budget_log.py CREATE TABLE + ix_tiingo_budget_log_month_year + downgrade 反序 (revision 0002→0003); workbench/deploy/scripts/deploy.sh schema-assert required 集合加 tiingo_budget_log (缺 schema check FAIL exit=1); workbench_api/db/migrations/env.py fileConfig(disable_existing_loggers=False) 根因发现: 先前 alembic upgrade in-process 默认会调 logging.config.fileConfig 把 cost_guard/dashboard 等已存在 logger 全 disable，下游 test_db_degrade caplog assertion fail；这个改是 cross-cutting 工程性 fix 对所有 in-process alembic test 都有益; TiingoSnapshotLoader.__init__ 加 guard: _Guard | None default MonthlyBudgetGuard.default() (_Guard Protocol 让 test stub 不必继承 frozen dataclass); fetch_daily_bars 把 self._guard.check_and_increment() 移到 HTTP 之前 (tripped cap halts pre-network；BudgetExceeded → 不调 HTTP); tests +15 (test_cost_guard.py 7 default factory + frozen+slots + silent first call + near-cap warning 用 direct logger handler 因 caplog 易被 alembic 关 + cap raise no-increment + no-arg path monkeypatch default_log_session + BudgetExceeded propagate + test_budget_log_repo.py 5 empty=0 + insert+accumulate + sum across days in month + month rollover reset + alembic up/down 验证 + test_tiingo_loader.py 3 new guard called once before HTTP + BudgetExceeded halts pre-network + default constructor cap=10);
